workout.title: AM: Rest (Knee Injury) + PM: Coaching Session
workout.meta: PM: 900 yd | 1:23 | RPE 3 | Coach Paul Capuzzo #CMC
sets: AM: L knee pain - VMO inferior/medial insertion. Icing + rest.
PM: Technical cues + drills to sharpen form
Lots of 50yd drill reps with long rest
workout.note: Knee improved by afternoon. Major streamline breakthrough in coaching.

workout.title: Morning Swim - 1,675 yd
sets: Focused on streamline cues from coaching
Applied drill work from Monday PM session
workout.note: Solid session applying coaching cues. HR stayed controlled.

workout.title: Indoor Ride - Skipped
workout.note: Will make up bike volume later in the week if possible.

workout.title: AM Swim - FORM Goggles Test
sets: First swim with FORM smart goggles!
400 yd Warm Up - test display, get comfortable
workout.note: New FORM subscription started today. Focus on learning the display and getting baseline metrics.

workout.title: 2,200 yd - Endurance + Build
sets: 200 yd Cool Down - easy choice stroke
workout.note: Apply coaching cues. Will update with specific drills after coach email.

workout.title: Outdoor Ride - Steady Aerobic
sets: First 3-4 mi - easy warm up, settle in
Practice fueling: gel every 45 min + water
Last 2 mi - easy cool down spin

workout.title: Long Run - Easy
sets: Practice fueling: gel at mile 4 and 7
Monitor L ankle + knee - back off if needed
workout.note: Day after long ride - legs may feel heavy. Good brick prep. Monitor knee carefully.

weeklySummary.title: Week 1 Summary (Updated)
weeklySummary.content: Swim 4x (coaching + 1,675yd + FORM test + 2,200yd) - Bike 1x (outdoor Sat) - Run 1x (long Sun)
weeklySummary.changes: Changes: Wed indoor bike skipped. Thu run > swim (FORM goggles debut!). Extra swim focus this week.
weeklySummary.focus: Focus: FORM goggles setup, maintain swim momentum, protect the knee.
